title: pelargonium × revolutiflorum
intro: Pelargonium × revolutiflorum, a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, is a hybrid of the Pelargonium species and is commonly known as a type of geranium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × revolutiflorum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
